offer: For logistics carriers managing 10-50 vehicles, inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance schedules causes unexpected breakdowns. We automate fleet management and maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and paper logs.
problem: Inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance schedules leads to unexpected breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach with demo video to logistics carriers
Community forums where logistics carriers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for vehicle maintenance records.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as user templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
